creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Here’s what we didn’t tell you about our trip to Madrid… 👀 Trust me, this will change your travel life!

Comment your next travel destination and we’ll send a link to @jetpacglobal as well as a secret discount code 😉

transcription.text: You guys might remember that we flew to Madrid at the start of the year, but here's what you didn't see. It was back to back from the moment we landed with different reservations, timings and locations across the city. Everything was scheduled to the last minute, so if one thing went wrong, the whole day would fall apart. And here's what we did to make sure that didn't happen. At the airport, instead of dealing with physical SIM cards, we just bought and set up a Jetpack eSIM before the flight even took off. It was done in a couple of minutes whilst we were waiting to board. Then when we landed in Madrid, we had instant connectivity straight away. No searching for Wi-Fi, no roaming stress, just everything working from the airport. It made the whole trip feel effortless. And one of the most underrated perks is lounge access if your flight gets delayed by an hour or more. It's way cheaper than roaming and works across loads of destinations, so it really is a no-brainer for your next trip. Comment your next travel destination and we'll send you a DM to the link we used to get Jetpack and a discount code too.
